    2026-06-17T17:16:08
    cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat README.md
    返回码: 0
    # ubs-io #### 介绍 UBS IO是面向推理、训练、后训练等多种场景的IO加速服务套件，提供NPU直通存储、基于块存储的分布式KV/文件缓存和块存储扩展特性等加速能力，支持模型权重文件启动加载、KV Cache复用卸载等场景IO性能提升。 #### 软件架构 UBS IO目前主要包括以下关键特性： NDS(NPU Direct Storage)：提供KV和文件直通接口，支持本地PCIE SSD、基于UB的块存储和基于RDMA/UB互连的外置存储系统数据直通读写NPU HBM，减少存储设备与CPU侧冗余的内存拷贝开销。NDS提供适配主流开源多层级KV Cache缓存框架的插件扩展，可适配业界主流的开源三方文件/KV缓存系统，加速KV Cache数据的复用加载。 IO缓存：提供基于FUSE的标准文件IO接口和原生KV接口，支持基于服务器、超节点的本地块存储和存算分离的分布式存储服务器等多种系统架构部署，原生支持适配NDS服务，实现KV Cache、权重加载等场景的最短路径传输。 块存储扩展特性：提供对块存储的软硬协同功能，包括多类型块设备的空间分配和管理、块存储多流IO适配、NPU/块存储 UB建链和内存注册协同等，支持与块存储UB池化系统对接。 #### 参与贡献 我们欢迎社区开发者提交 Issue、PR 或参与讨论！ 请先阅读贡献指南，并遵守 openEuler 社区行为准则。 #### 许可证 本项目采用 Mulan PSL v2 开源许可证。
    2026-06-17T17:16:08
    cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat README_EN.md
    返回码: 0
    # ubs-io ## Introduction UBS IO is an I/O acceleration service suite designed for various scenarios such as inference, training, and post-training. It provides acceleration capabilities like NPU Direct Storage, distributed block-storage-based KV/file cache, and block storage expansion. These capabilities help improve I/O performance in scenarios such as model weight file loading during startup and KV cache reuse and offloading. ## Software Architecture UBS IO provides the following key features: NPU Direct Storage (NDS): It provides direct-access interfaces for KV and files. It supports direct data read/write between the NPU HBM and local PCIe SSDs, UB-based block storage, or external storage systems interconnected through RDMA/UB, reducing redundant memory copy overhead of storage devices and CPU. NDS provides plug-in extensions compatible with mainstream open-source multi-level KV cache frameworks and can integrate with popular open-source third-party file/KV cache systems, accelerating KV cache reuse and loading. I/O cache: It provides FUSE-based standard file I/O interfaces and native KV interfaces. It supports deployment across multiple system architectures, including local block storage based on servers and supernodes, as well as distributed storage servers with storage-compute decoupled architecture. It is natively compatible with NDS services to enable shortest-path transmission in scenarios such as KV cache and weight loading. Block storage expansion: It provides software-hardware collaboration for block storage, including space allocation and management across multiple types of block devices, multi-stream I/O adaptation for block storage, and coordinated UB connection setup and memory registration between NPUs and block storage. It also supports interconnection with UB-based block storage pooling systems. ## How to Contribute We welcome community developers to submit issues, PRs, or participate in discussions. Please read the contribution guide and
    2026-06-17T17:16:09
    cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat ubsio-boostio/CMakeLists.txt
    返回码: 0
    cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16) project(boostio CXX C) set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 11) message(STATUS "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE: ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}") set(BOOSTIO_COMMON_FLAGS "") if (CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "debug") set(HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS "-fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -fPIE -fPIC -ftrapv") else() set(HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS "-fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -fPIE -fPIC -ftrapv -s") endif() set(C_COMMON_FLAGS "${C_COMMON_FLAGS} ${BOOSTIO_COMMON_FLAGS} -fno-omit-frame-pointer ${HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS}") set(CXX_COMMON_FLAGS "${CXX_COMMON_FLAGS} ${BOOSTIO_COMMON_FLAGS} -fno-omit-frame-pointer ${HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS}") set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "${C_COMMON_FLAGS} -O0 -ggdb3 -g -lrt") set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE "${C_COMMON_FLAGS} -O3 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -g -DNDEBUG=1 -lrt") set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CXX_COMMON_FLAGS} -O0 -ggdb3 -g -lrt") set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE "${CXX_COMMON_FLAGS} -O3 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -g -DNDEBUG=1 -lrt") set(SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/src) set(3RDPARTY_SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty) set(OUTPUT_PATH ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/dist) set(BUILD_PATH ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/) set(STUB_SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/test/stub) set(PROJECT_3RDPARTY_SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty) set(PROJECT_BUILD_PATH ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/Build) set(PROJECT_OUTPUT_PATH ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/dist) set(PROJECT_3RDPARTY_BIN_DIR ${PROJECT_OUTPUT_PATH}/3rdparty) set(ENV{3RDPARTY_BIN_DIR} ${PROJECT_3RDPARTY_BIN_DIR}) # set install target top dir if (${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX} MATCHES "/usr/local") set(TARGET_INSTALL_DIR ${OUTPUT_PATH}/bio) elseif(NOT CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX) set(TARGET_INSTALL_DIR ${OUTPUT_PATH}/bio) else() set(TARGET_INSTALL_DIR ${OUTPUT_PATH}/bio) endif() set(TARGET_INSTALL_BIN_DIR ${TARGET_INSTALL_DIR}/bin) set(TARGET_INSTALL_INCLUDE_DIR ${TARGET_INSTALL_DIR}/include) set(TARGET_INSTALL_LIB_DIR ${TARGET_INSTALL_DIR}/lib) messag

    --- # clang-format 代码格式化配置 # 基于 Google 风格，针对项目约定进行定制 # 修改此文件后，建议对项目代码运行 clang-format 验证格式化结果 BasedOnStyle: Google # --- 缩进与行宽 --- IndentWidth: 4 # 缩进4空格（Google默认2） TabWidth: 4 UseTab: Never ColumnLimit: 120 # 行宽上限120字符（Google默认80） ContinuationIndentWidth: 4 ConstructorInitializerIndentWidth: 4 AccessModifierOffset: -4 # public/private等相对类体缩进-4，使其与class关键字对齐 # --- 大括号风格 --- # 混合风格：函数定义大括号另起一行(Allman)，其余大括号不换行(K&R) BreakBeforeBraces: Custom BraceWrapping: AfterFunction: true # 函数定义大括号另起一行

    --- # clang-tidy 静态检查配置 # 采用白名单策略：先禁用所有检查(-*)，再逐项启用，避免版本升级引入意外告警 # 修改此文件后，建议运行 clang-tidy -list-checks 验证启用的检查列表 # 仅对项目源码头文件进行诊断 HeaderFilterRegex: '^(src|plugin|include|test)/.*\.h$' Checks: > -*, # --- bugprone: 常见编程错误检测 --- bugprone-argument-comment, # 命名参数注释与声明不匹配 bugprone-dangling-handle, # 悬垂引用(如string_view引用已销毁对象) bugprone-fold-init-type, # std::accumulate等折叠操作类型不匹配 bugprone-forward-declaration-namespace, # 前向声明放在错误命名空间 bugprone-forwarding-reference-overload, # 转发引用重载隐藏拷贝/移动构造 bugprone-shadow, # 变量名遮蔽外层作用域 bugprone-sizeof-*, # sizeof表达式误用 bugprone-string-constructor, # std::string构造函数误用

    3. #3
      7 个字段
      timestamp
      2026-06-17T17:16:08
      command
      cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat README.md
      success
      true
      output
      # ubs-io #### 介绍 UBS IO是面向推理、训练、后训练等多种场景的IO加速服务套件，提供NPU直通存储、基于块存储的分布式KV/文件缓存和块存储扩展特性等加速能力，支持模型权重文件启动加载、KV Cache复用卸载等场景IO性能提升。 #### 软件架构 UBS IO目前主要包括以下关键特性： NDS(NPU Direct Storage)：提供KV和文件直通接口，支持本地PCIE SSD、基于UB的块存储和基于RDMA/UB互连的外置存储系统数据直通读写NPU HBM，减少存储设备与CPU侧冗余的内存拷贝开销。NDS提供适配主流开源多层级KV Cache缓存框架的插件扩展，可适配业界主流的开源三方文件/KV缓存系统，加速KV Cache数据的复用加载。 IO缓存：提供基于FUSE的标准文件IO接口和原生KV接口，支持基于服务器、超节点的本地块存储和存算分离的分布式存储服务器等多种系统架构部署，原生支持适配NDS服务，实现KV Cache、权重加载等场景的最短路径传输。 块存储扩展特性：提供对块存储的软硬协同功能，包括多类型块设备的空间分配和管理、块存储多流IO适配、NPU/块存储 UB建链和内存注册协同等，支持与块存储UB池化系统对接。 #### 参与贡献 我们欢迎社区开发者提交 Issue、PR 或参与讨论！ 请先阅读贡献指南，并遵守 openEuler 社区行为准则。 #### 许可证 本项目采用 Mulan PSL v2 开源许可证。
      error
      returncode
      0
      duration_seconds
      0
    4. #4
      7 个字段
      timestamp
      2026-06-17T17:16:08
      command
      cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat README_EN.md
      success
      true
      output
      # ubs-io ## Introduction UBS IO is an I/O acceleration service suite designed for various scenarios such as inference, training, and post-training. It provides acceleration capabilities like NPU Direct Storage, distributed block-storage-based KV/file cache, and block storage expansion. These capabilities help improve I/O performance in scenarios such as model weight file loading during startup and KV cache reuse and offloading. ## Software Architecture UBS IO provides the following key features: NPU Direct Storage (NDS): It provides direct-access interfaces for KV and files. It supports direct data read/write between the NPU HBM and local PCIe SSDs, UB-based block storage, or external storage systems interconnected through RDMA/UB, reducing redundant memory copy overhead of storage devices and CPU. NDS provides plug-in extensions compatible with mainstream open-source multi-level KV cache frameworks and can integrate with popular open-source third-party file/KV cache systems, accelerating KV cache reuse and loading. I/O cache: It provides FUSE-based standard file I/O interfaces and native KV interfaces. It supports deployment across multiple system architectures, including local block storage based on servers and supernodes, as well as distributed storage servers with storage-compute decoupled architecture. It is natively compatible with NDS services to enable shortest-path transmission in scenarios such as KV cache and weight loading. Block storage expansion: It provides software-hardware collaboration for block storage, including space allocation and management across multiple types of block devices, multi-stream I/O adaptation for block storage, and coordinated UB connection setup and memory registration between NPUs and block storage. It also supports interconnection with UB-based block storage pooling systems. ## How to Contribute We welcome community developers to submit issues, PRs, or participate in discussions. Please read the contribution guide and
      error
      returncode
      0
      duration_seconds
      0
    5. #5
      7 个字段
      timestamp
      2026-06-17T17:16:09
      command
      cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat ubsio-boostio/CMakeLists.txt
      success
      true
      output
      cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16) project(boostio CXX C) set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 11) message(STATUS "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE: ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}") set(BOOSTIO_COMMON_FLAGS "") if (CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "debug") set(HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS "-fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -fPIE -fPIC -ftrapv") else() set(HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS "-fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -fPIE -fPIC -ftrapv -s") endif() set(C_COMMON_FLAGS "${C_COMMON_FLAGS} ${BOOSTIO_COMMON_FLAGS} -fno-omit-frame-pointer ${HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS}") set(CXX_COMMON_FLAGS "${CXX_COMMON_FLAGS} ${BOOSTIO_COMMON_FLAGS} -fno-omit-frame-pointer ${HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS}") set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "${C_COMMON_FLAGS} -O0 -ggdb3 -g -lrt") set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE "${C_COMMON_FLAGS} -O3 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -g -DNDEBUG=1 -lrt") set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CXX_COMMON_FLAGS} -O0 -ggdb3 -g -lrt") set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE "${CXX_COMMON_FLAGS} -O3 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -g -DNDEBUG=1 -lrt") set(SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/src) set(3RDPARTY_SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty) set(OUTPUT_PATH ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/dist) set(BUILD_PATH ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/) set(STUB_SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/test/stub) set(PROJECT_3RDPARTY_SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty) set(PROJECT_BUILD_PATH ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/Build) set(PROJECT_OUTPUT_PATH ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/dist) set(PROJECT_3RDPARTY_BIN_DIR ${PROJECT_OUTPUT_PATH}/3rdparty) set(ENV{3RDPARTY_BIN_DIR} ${PROJECT_3RDPARTY_BIN_DIR}) # set install target top dir if (${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX} MATCHES "/usr/local") set(TARGET_INSTALL_DIR ${OUTPUT_PATH}/bio) elseif(NOT CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX) set(TARGET_INSTALL_DIR ${OUTPUT_PATH}/bio) else() set(TARGET_INSTALL_DIR ${OUTPUT_PATH}/bio) endif() set(TARGET_INSTALL_BIN_DIR ${TARGET_INSTALL_DIR}/bin) set(TARGET_INSTALL_INCLUDE_DIR ${TARGET_INSTALL_DIR}/include) set(TARGET_INSTALL_LIB_DIR ${TARGET_INSTALL_DIR}/lib) messag
      error
      returncode

      duration_seconds

      repos: - repo: local hooks: - id: run-build name: Run Release Build entry: bash build.sh language: system pass_filenames: false files: ^(?!test/).*(\.(h|c|cpp|sh|cmake)|CMakeLists\.txt)$ - id: run-build-test name: Run Tests Build entry: bash build.sh test --skip-run-tests language: system pass_filenames: false files: ^test/.*\.(h|c|cpp|sh|cmake)$|^test/CMakeLists\.txt$ - id: clang-format exclude: (.*\/)?(3rdparty|ubsio-nds)\/ name: Run clang-format check entry: clang-format language: system files: \.(h|c|cpp)$ args: [-style=file, -i] - id: clang-tidy name: Run clang-tidy check entry: clang-tidy language: system files: ^(?!test/).*\.(h|c|cpp)$ args: [-p=cmake-build-release, -header-filter=.*, --fix] - id: clang-tidy-test name: Run clang-tidy check for test files entry: clang-tidy language: system files: ^test/.*\.(h|c|cpp)$ args: [-p=cmake-build-debug, --fix]

      command
      cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat .clang-format | head -20
      success
      true
      output
      --- # clang-format 代码格式化配置 # 基于 Google 风格，针对项目约定进行定制 # 修改此文件后，建议对项目代码运行 clang-format 验证格式化结果 BasedOnStyle: Google # --- 缩进与行宽 --- IndentWidth: 4 # 缩进4空格（Google默认2） TabWidth: 4 UseTab: Never ColumnLimit: 120 # 行宽上限120字符（Google默认80） ContinuationIndentWidth: 4 ConstructorInitializerIndentWidth: 4 AccessModifierOffset: -4 # public/private等相对类体缩进-4，使其与class关键字对齐 # --- 大括号风格 --- # 混合风格：函数定义大括号另起一行(Allman)，其余大括号不换行(K&R) BreakBeforeBraces: Custom BraceWrapping: AfterFunction: true # 函数定义大括号另起一行
      error
      returncode
      0
      duration_seconds
      0
    11. #11
      7 个字段
      timestamp
      2026-06-17T17:16:10
      command
      cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat .clang-tidy | head -20
      success
      true
      output
      --- # clang-tidy 静态检查配置 # 采用白名单策略：先禁用所有检查(-*)，再逐项启用，避免版本升级引入意外告警 # 修改此文件后，建议运行 clang-tidy -list-checks 验证启用的检查列表 # 仅对项目源码头文件进行诊断 HeaderFilterRegex: '^(src|plugin|include|test)/.*\.h$' Checks: > -*, # --- bugprone: 常见编程错误检测 --- bugprone-argument-comment, # 命名参数注释与声明不匹配 bugprone-dangling-handle, # 悬垂引用(如string_view引用已销毁对象) bugprone-fold-init-type, # std::accumulate等折叠操作类型不匹配 bugprone-forward-declaration-namespace, # 前向声明放在错误命名空间 bugprone-forwarding-reference-overload, # 转发引用重载隐藏拷贝/移动构造 bugprone-shadow, # 变量名遮蔽外层作用域 bugprone-sizeof-*, # sizeof表达式误用 bugprone-string-constructor, # std::string构造函数误用
      error
      returncode
      0

      total 52 drwxr-xr-x 17 root root 520 Jun 17 17:16 . drwxrwxrwt 6 root root 360 Jun 17 17:16 .. -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 5555 Jun 17 17:16 .clang-format -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 6657 Jun 17 17:16 .clang-tidy drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 60 Jun 17 17:16 csrc drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 60 Jun 17 17:16 dependence drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 100 Jun 17 17:16 docs drwxr-xr-x 8 root root 260 Jun 17 17:16 .git -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 127 Jun 17 17:16 .gitattributes drwxr-xr-x 3 root root 60 Jun 17 17:16 .gitcode -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 57 Jun 17 17:16 .gitignore -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 69 Jun 17 17:16 .lfsconfig -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 9232 Jun 17 17:16 LICENSE -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 1114 Jun 17 17:16 .pre-commit-config.yaml -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 2111 Jun 17 17:16 README_EN.md -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 1504 Jun 17 17:16 README.md drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 60 Jun 17 17:16 scripts drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 60 Jun 17 17:16 security drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 60 Jun 17 17:16 tools drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 60 Jun 17 17:16 ubsio-bdm drwxr-xr-x 8 root root 300 Jun 17 17:16 ubsio-boostio drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 60 Jun 17 17:16 ubsio-common drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 60 Jun 17 17:16 ubsio-file drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 60 Jun 17 17:16 ubsio-kv drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 60 Jun 17 17:16 ubsio-meta drwxr-xr-x 5 root root 140 Jun 17 17:16 ubsio-nds

    3. #3
      7 个字段
      timestamp
      2026-06-17T17:16:08
      command
      cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat README.md
      success
      true
      output
      # ubs-io #### 介绍 UBS IO是面向推理、训练、后训练等多种场景的IO加速服务套件，提供NPU直通存储、基于块存储的分布式KV/文件缓存和块存储扩展特性等加速能力，支持模型权重文件启动加载、KV Cache复用卸载等场景IO性能提升。 #### 软件架构 UBS IO目前主要包括以下关键特性： NDS(NPU Direct Storage)：提供KV和文件直通接口，支持本地PCIE SSD、基于UB的块存储和基于RDMA/UB互连的外置存储系统数据直通读写NPU HBM，减少存储设备与CPU侧冗余的内存拷贝开销。NDS提供适配主流开源多层级KV Cache缓存框架的插件扩展，可适配业界主流的开源三方文件/KV缓存系统，加速KV Cache数据的复用加载。 IO缓存：提供基于FUSE的标准文件IO接口和原生KV接口，支持基于服务器、超节点的本地块存储和存算分离的分布式存储服务器等多种系统架构部署，原生支持适配NDS服务，实现KV Cache、权重加载等场景的最短路径传输。 块存储扩展特性：提供对块存储的软硬协同功能，包括多类型块设备的空间分配和管理、块存储多流IO适配、NPU/块存储 UB建链和内存注册协同等，支持与块存储UB池化系统对接。 #### 参与贡献 我们欢迎社区开发者提交 Issue、PR 或参与讨论！ 请先阅读贡献指南，并遵守 openEuler 社区行为准则。 #### 许可证 本项目采用 Mulan PSL v2 开源许可证。
      error
      returncode
      0
      duration_seconds
      0
    4. #4
      7 个字段
      timestamp
      2026-06-17T17:16:08
      command
      cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat README_EN.md
      success
      true
      output
      # ubs-io ## Introduction UBS IO is an I/O acceleration service suite designed for various scenarios such as inference, training, and post-training. It provides acceleration capabilities like NPU Direct Storage, distributed block-storage-based KV/file cache, and block storage expansion. These capabilities help improve I/O performance in scenarios such as model weight file loading during startup and KV cache reuse and offloading. ## Software Architecture UBS IO provides the following key features: NPU Direct Storage (NDS): It provides direct-access interfaces for KV and files. It supports direct data read/write between the NPU HBM and local PCIe SSDs, UB-based block storage, or external storage systems interconnected through RDMA/UB, reducing redundant memory copy overhead of storage devices and CPU. NDS provides plug-in extensions compatible with mainstream open-source multi-level KV cache frameworks and can integrate with popular open-source third-party file/KV cache systems, accelerating KV cache reuse and loading. I/O cache: It provides FUSE-based standard file I/O interfaces and native KV interfaces. It supports deployment across multiple system architectures, including local block storage based on servers and supernodes, as well as distributed storage servers with storage-compute decoupled architecture. It is natively compatible with NDS services to enable shortest-path transmission in scenarios such as KV cache and weight loading. Block storage expansion: It provides software-hardware collaboration for block storage, including space allocation and management across multiple types of block devices, multi-stream I/O adaptation for block storage, and coordinated UB connection setup and memory registration between NPUs and block storage. It also supports interconnection with UB-based block storage pooling systems. ## How to Contribute We welcome community developers to submit issues, PRs, or participate in discussions. Please read the contribution guide and
      error
      returncode
      0
      duration_seconds
      0
    5. #5
      7 个字段
      timestamp
      2026-06-17T17:16:09
      command
      cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat ubsio-boostio/CMakeLists.txt
      success
      true
      output
      cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16) project(boostio CXX C) set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 11) message(STATUS "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE: ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}") set(BOOSTIO_COMMON_FLAGS "") if (CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "debug") set(HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS "-fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -fPIE -fPIC -ftrapv") else() set(HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS "-fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -fPIE -fPIC -ftrapv -s") endif() set(C_COMMON_FLAGS "${C_COMMON_FLAGS} ${BOOSTIO_COMMON_FLAGS} -fno-omit-frame-pointer ${HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS}") set(CXX_COMMON_FLAGS "${CXX_COMMON_FLAGS} ${BOOSTIO_COMMON_FLAGS} -fno-omit-frame-pointer ${HUAWEI_SECURE_BUILD_FLAGS}") set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "${C_COMMON_FLAGS} -O0 -ggdb3 -g -lrt") set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE "${C_COMMON_FLAGS} -O3 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -g -DNDEBUG=1 -lrt") set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CXX_COMMON_FLAGS} -O0 -ggdb3 -g -lrt") set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE "${CXX_COMMON_FLAGS} -O3 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -g -DNDEBUG=1 -lrt") set(SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/src) set(3RDPARTY_SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty) set(OUTPUT_PATH ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/dist) set(BUILD_PATH ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/) set(STUB_SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/test/stub) set(PROJECT_3RDPARTY_SRC_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty) set(PROJECT_BUILD_PATH ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/Build) set(PROJECT_OUTPUT_PATH ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/dist) set(PROJECT_3RDPARTY_BIN_DIR ${PROJECT_OUTPUT_PATH}/3rdparty) set(ENV{3RDPARTY_BIN_DIR} ${PROJECT_3RDPARTY_BIN_DIR}) # set install target top dir if (${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX} MATCHES "/usr/local") set(TARGET_INSTALL_DIR ${OUTPUT_PATH}/bio) elseif(NOT CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX) set(TARGET_INSTALL_DIR ${OUTPUT_PATH}/bio) else() set(TARGET_INSTALL_DIR ${OUTPUT_PATH}/bio) endif() set(TARGET_INSTALL_BIN_DIR ${TARGET_INSTALL_DIR}/bin) set(TARGET_INSTALL_INCLUDE_DIR ${TARGET_INSTALL_DIR}/include) set(TARGET_INSTALL_LIB_DIR ${TARGET_INSTALL_DIR}/lib) messag
      error
      returncode
      0
      duration_seconds
      0

      repos: - repo: local hooks: - id: run-build name: Run Release Build entry: bash build.sh language: system pass_filenames: false files: ^(?!test/).*(\.(h|c|cpp|sh|cmake)|CMakeLists\.txt)$ - id: run-build-test name: Run Tests Build entry: bash build.sh test --skip-run-tests language: system pass_filenames: false files: ^test/.*\.(h|c|cpp|sh|cmake)$|^test/CMakeLists\.txt$ - id: clang-format exclude: (.*\/)?(3rdparty|ubsio-nds)\/ name: Run clang-format check entry: clang-format language: system files: \.(h|c|cpp)$ args: [-style=file, -i] - id: clang-tidy name: Run clang-tidy check entry: clang-tidy language: system files: ^(?!test/).*\.(h|c|cpp)$ args: [-p=cmake-build-release, -header-filter=.*, --fix] - id: clang-tidy-test name: Run clang-tidy check for test files entry: clang-tidy language: system files: ^test/.*\.(h|c|cpp)$ args: [-p=cmake-build-debug, --fix]
      error

      7 个字段

      command
      cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat .clang-format | head -20
      success
      true
      output
      --- # clang-format 代码格式化配置 # 基于 Google 风格，针对项目约定进行定制 # 修改此文件后，建议对项目代码运行 clang-format 验证格式化结果 BasedOnStyle: Google # --- 缩进与行宽 --- IndentWidth: 4 # 缩进4空格（Google默认2） TabWidth: 4 UseTab: Never ColumnLimit: 120 # 行宽上限120字符（Google默认80） ContinuationIndentWidth: 4 ConstructorInitializerIndentWidth: 4 AccessModifierOffset: -4 # public/private等相对类体缩进-4，使其与class关键字对齐 # --- 大括号风格 --- # 混合风格：函数定义大括号另起一行(Allman)，其余大括号不换行(K&R) BreakBeforeBraces: Custom BraceWrapping: AfterFunction: true # 函数定义大括号另起一行
      error
      returncode
      0
      duration_seconds
      0
    11. #11
      7 个字段
      timestamp
      2026-06-17T17:16:10
      command
      cd /tmp/ubs-io && cat .clang-tidy | head -20
      success
      true
      output
      --- # clang-tidy 静态检查配置 # 采用白名单策略：先禁用所有检查(-*)，再逐项启用，避免版本升级引入意外告警 # 修改此文件后，建议运行 clang-tidy -list-checks 验证启用的检查列表 # 仅对项目源码头文件进行诊断 HeaderFilterRegex: '^(src|plugin|include|test)/.*\.h$' Checks: > -*, # --- bugprone: 常见编程错误检测 --- bugprone-argument-comment, # 命名参数注释与声明不匹配 bugprone-dangling-handle, # 悬垂引用(如string_view引用已销毁对象) bugprone-fold-init-type, # std::accumulate等折叠操作类型不匹配 bugprone-forward-declaration-namespace, # 前向声明放在错误命名空间 bugprone-forwarding-reference-overload, # 转发引用重载隐藏拷贝/移动构造 bugprone-shadow, # 变量名遮蔽外层作用域 bugprone-sizeof-*, # sizeof表达式误用 bugprone-string-constructor, # std::string构造函数误用
      error
      returncode
      0
      duration_seconds
      0
